wave.name: Database & Model Hardening
wave.task: Add splitFranchisee and passiveFranchiseeId to Order model.
Ensure ProfessionalNetwork has correct relations for reverse lookup.

wave.name: Core Split Engine Refactor
wave.task: Update SplitResult interface to include franchisee split.
Refactor calculateSplits to accept professionalId and check ProfessionalNetwork for passive partner links.
Implement the passive commission logic (deduct from platform or captação share based on business rule).

wave.name: Order Engine Integration
wave.task: Update checkout and processPayment to identify the event's photographer and pass their ID to the split engine.
Persist splitFranchisee and passiveFranchiseeId during order creation and updates.
Ensure finalized orders correctly record these splits for payout reporting.

wave.name: Financial Transparency Dashboards
wave.task: Display the split breakdown including the franchisee's commission.
Add a 'Passive Revenue' widget/list showing commissions earned from referred professionals.
(Optional) Clarify the net amount for the photographer after all splits.

verification.step: Unit test PricingService.calculateSplits with a mock referral link.
E2E Test: Register Pro with ref code -> Create Event -> Process Payment -> Check Order Splits in DB.
